briefdescription.para: \par \b Purpose\/ \: init method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: load method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: save method \par \b I/O\/ \: Input -> Output \par \b Complexity\/ \: 5
\par \b Purpose\/ \: AbstractPickledLineTypeClassifier for document structure extraction pipeline

detaileddescription.para: Abstract class for lines classification with functionality of loading and saving a classifier.
